name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: Grand Prairie, TX's Loanstar Title Loans at 810 E Main St provides fast title and payday loans weekdays 10am–6pm.
description_long:
Loanstar Title Loans in Grand Prairie is located at 810 E Main St, a standalone storefront serving the central Grand Prairie area. The office is open weekdays from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Saturday hours from 9 AM to 2 PM, making it convenient for working residents to get a loan without missing their schedule. Whether you need quick cash before the weekend or a short-term advance, the Grand Prairie location keeps extended hours to fit your timeline.

At this Grand Prairie, TX location, the staff provides title loans, payday advances, and personal loans tailored to your situation. You can walk in without an appointment to discuss your options, or call 972-504-6928 to ask about processing times and what to bring. The team works quickly to approve and fund loans, understanding that financial emergencies don't wait.

If you're a Grand Prairie resident facing an unexpected bill or short-term cash need, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title if applying for a title loan—the staff will walk you through the process in about 15–20 minutes. Loanstar Title Loans has been serving the community with transparent pricing and fast turnaround.
address: 810 E Main St, Grand Prairie, TX 75050

company_info.headquarters: 810 E Main St, Grand Prairie, TX 75050

pros: Loan amounts up to $10,000 available, higher than typical payday loans
Fast funding with same-day or next-day cash access for emergency situations
Established company with 25+ years of operating history since 1990
Multiple payment method options: cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
Multiple locations across Fort Worth metro area for accessibility
Published fee schedules and OCCC-compliant disclosure documents available
Online loan application and payment options available alongside in-person visits
cons: Title loans typically carry very high interest rates and APR costs (specific rates not disclosed on website)
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan payments are missed or defaulted
Requires clear vehicle title as collateral, limiting accessibility to vehicle owners
Limited operating hours (closes at 6 PM weekdays, 2-3 PM Saturdays) may not suit all schedules
Website lacks specific APR information, terms, or pricing details needed for informed comparison
best_for: Vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies needing $1,000-$10,000 with no other credit options
People with poor credit unable to qualify for traditional personal loans or credit products
Borrowers who can repay quickly and avoid the high cumulative interest costs of title loans
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is appropriate only for vehicle owners facing genuine financial emergencies who have exhausted other borrowing options and can repay quickly. The critical caveat is that title loans are expensive credit products with high APR rates and serious collateral risk—borrowers should review specific terms before applying and avoid this product for non-emergency purposes.
services: Car title loans (cash secured by vehicle equity)
In-person loan processing at physical locations
Multiple payment methods: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Fee schedule disclosures for $600, $1,200, and $2,000 loans
Multiple installment and single installment loan options
meta_description: Loanstar Title Loans at 810 E Main St, Grand Prairie, TX. Fast title and payday loans with same-day processing.
